    "R1.2": "The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: the primary SA definition counts both (a) correct answers on clear prompts and (b) clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts, but the later computational formula reduces SA to correct answers on clear prompts divided by 800 only — dropping the ambiguous-subset clarification credit entirely. If the task is a technical review, catching this is load-bearing.",
    "R1.3": "The closing claim that 'selective response is largely a solved problem at the frontier' is a strong generalization resting on four models exceeding 60% SA on a single 800-item benchmark with a single-sample, zero-temperature protocol; evidence-to-claim alignment warrants scrutiny if the task is a logical/technical review.",
    "R1.6": "The most common interpretation of 'help me with this section' in a writing context is prose-level editing — sentence clarity, precision of technical language, and paragraph flow — making R1.6 plausibly load-bearing if the task is writing polish."
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you looking for writing polish (prose clarity, sentence quality, flow), or a logical/technical review (metric definition consistency, evidence-to-claim validity, internal contradictions)?"
}

rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains a direct internal contradiction: the primary SA definition counts both (a) correct answers on clear prompts and (b) clarifying questions on ambiguous prompts, but the later computational formula reduces SA to correct answers on clear prompts divided by 800 only — dropping the ambiguous-subset clarification credit entirely. If the task is a technical review, catching this is load-bearing.
rationale.R1.3: The closing claim that 'selective response is largely a solved problem at the frontier' is a strong generalization resting on four models exceeding 60% SA on a single 800-item benchmark with a single-sample, zero-temperature protocol; evidence-to-claim alignment warrants scrutiny if the task is a logical/technical review.
rationale.R1.6: The most common interpretation of 'help me with this section' in a writing context is prose-level editing — sentence clarity, precision of technical language, and paragraph flow — making R1.6 plausibly load-bearing if the task is writing polish.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you looking for writing polish (prose clarity, sentence quality, flow), or a logical/technical review (metric definition consistency, evidence-to-claim validity, internal contradictions)?
